description_long: This is a well-worn, metallic frying pan with a deep, cylindrical body and a visibly aged, mottled surface. The pan's exterior and interior both show signs of heavy use, with patches of discoloration and surface wear, suggesting it has seen extensive cooking or exposure to the elements. The handle is long, straight, and made of metal, attached securely to the side of the pan, and features a small hole at the end for hanging. The rim of the pan is straight and moderately thick, with no visible pouring spouts or reinforced edges. The bottom of the pan appears flat and similarly weathered, lacking any distinct patterns or branding. No visible brand logos or markings are present on either the pan or the handle.
description: A heavily used, metallic frying pan with a deep, cylindrical body and a long, straight handle featuring a hanging hole. The surface is mottled and worn, with no visible branding or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep, round body of the pan and the base of the handle attachment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the straight metal handle and the pan's cylindrical depth.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the open mouth of the pan and the handle extending directly away.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying both the pan's interior wear and the handle's attachment point.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight metal handle with a round cross-section, no ergonomic features, and a small hole at the end for hanging.
attribute_rim_design: Straight, moderately thick rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Flat and worn with no visible patterns, ridges, or brand stamps; surface is rough and mottled.
